ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by plaintiff in pro per. Emilio Mayren a friend of Mr. Lim appearing in court. Informed the court that Mr. Lim is sick. Sanction issued on Mar-26-24 and Jan-23-24 are ordered vacated by the Court. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed by self-represented plaintiff, the Court orders the case dismissed without prejudice. This dismissal is pursuant to Government Code section 68608(b) and C.C.P. 583.210 and C.C.P. 583.250. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)
